q: Describe a time you needed to use your imagination.
cue_card: A time you needed to use your imagination.
Why you needed to use your imagination
And explain how you felt about it
examiner_note: Với chủ đề trừu tượng như trí tưởng tượng, hãy sử dụng các cụm từ vựng về tư duy (cognitive flexibility, outside-the-box thinking, visualize). Hãy miêu tả một tình huống cụ thể (vấn đề trong dự án, viết truyện, giải quyết xung đột) để câu trả lời bớt mơ hồ.

samples.band7: I'd like to tell you about a time I had to use my imagination at school. It was about two years ago when we had to write a short story for our English class. I decided to write about a future world where robots and humans live together. I had to imagine what the city would look like and how people would travel. I used my imagination to create a flying car and talking houses. I felt very happy when I finished it because I realized that I could be very creative.
samples.band8: I’m going to describe a situation where I had to rely heavily on my imagination, which occurred about a year ago during a high-stakes marketing project. We were tasked with rebranding a traditional tea company for a younger, tech-savvy audience. I needed to think outside the box to come up with a campaign that was both nostalgic and futuristic. I visualized a digital interactive garden where users could virtually grow their own tea leaves based on their moods. It was a challenging exercise in cognitive flexibility, but seeing the final concept come to life was incredibly rewarding and boosted my confidence in my creative abilities.
samples.band9: A particularly memorable instance when I had to harness the full power of my imagination was during a voluntary workshop for underprivileged children, where I was responsible for an interactive storytelling session. The goal was to transport the kids to an alternate reality without any physical props, solely through the power of narrative. I had to exercise immense imaginative faculty to weave a complex world of floating islands and mythical creatures, encouraging the children to co-create the environment with me. This experience required profound mental agility and a knack for spontaneous visualization. Ultimately, it was an exhilarating experience that underscored the importance of nurturing one’s creative spirit to overcome logistical limitations and connect with others on a deeper, more whimsical level.

v.meaning: Tư duy sáng tạo, không theo lối mòn (Think creatively, unimpeded by orthodox or conventional constraints)
v.example: To solve this architectural puzzle, we really had to think outside the box.

v.meaning: Sự linh hoạt trong nhận thức (The mental ability to switch between thinking about two different concepts, or to think about multiple concepts simultaneously)
v.example: Using your imagination helps improve your cognitive flexibility.

v.meaning: Hình dung, mường tượng (Form a mental image of; imagine)
v.example: He tried to visualize the end result before starting the project.

v.meaning: Khả năng tưởng tượng (The inherent mental power of forming new ideas or images)
v.example: She possesses an extraordinary imaginative faculty that allows her to write incredible novels.

v.meaning: Kỳ dị, hay thay đổi, đầy tưởng tượng (Playfully quaint or fanciful, especially in an appealing and amusing way)
v.example: The story had a whimsical tone that children absolutely loved.

v.meaning: Làm phấn chấn, thú vị (Making one feel very happy, animated, or elated; thrilling)
v.example: It was an exhilarating experience to see my ideas appreciated by others.

topic: Describe a time you needed to use your imagination.
